message:
audit: batch 478 — supervision.rs (8362L) + gen_server.rs (5778L) SOUND

supervision.rs: restart escalation, monitor cleanup, spawn-failure
cancel cascade all correct. No restart loops or zombie states.

gen_server.rs: Reply drop bomb linearity, call cancel-safety with
abort on send failure, drain semantics, phase budget guards. No
mailbox leaks or reply channel issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
